# Final Submission QA

Perform final QA before adjuster submission.

Checklist:
1. Facts vs assumptions separated
2. Category separation preserved
3. Invoice vs proposal labeling correct
4. RCV/ACV/depreciation/tax/O&P distinctions clear
5. Evidence support mapped to major requested items
6. Open verification items disclosed
7. Tone professional and non-inflammatory

Output:
- Pass/fail by section
- Required fixes
- Ready-to-submit summary
